creator: m.k12015@gmail.com
text:
editors/openoffice.org-3 are failed to build in recent ports. It is because of the a source file has CR+LF (it mease dos type End-of-line code).
The source file is placed at
/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO300_m15/curl/curl-7.12.2.patch

This problem also poited out in the following forum thread.
http://forums.freebsd.org/showthread.php?p=22150

How-To-Repeat: Build openoffice.org-3 by ports
